data.acceptance:
1. The overview screen exposes a stale-beat grooming surface that counts and lists non-terminal beats older than 7 days.
2. Stale beat review categories are represented as: still do, reshape, and drop.
3. The review trigger passes selected stale beats plus the selected agent/model through a backend route or existing dispatch/session path.
4. Tests cover stale-beat age classification and review request payload shaping.
5. Existing lint, typecheck, default test, and build commands pass.
